title: Backend Software Engineer
description: We are looking for a Backend Software Engineer to design and maintain distributed systems handling high-throughput data pipelines. Responsibilities include building scalable services, optimizing database performance, debugging production issues under load, and collaborating with cross-functional teams. Strong fundamentals in data structures, algorithms, and systems design are required. Experience with cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines is a plus.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description: This role focuses on improving the reliability, performance, and scalability of production infrastructure. You will build monitoring and alerting systems, automate incident response, lead postmortems, and reduce toil through tooling. Candidates should have hands-on experience with containerized deployments, cloud infrastructure provisioning, and a track record of independently diagnosing and resolving complex production incidents.

title: Data Engineer
description: We need a Data Engineer to build and maintain robust data pipelines processing large-scale datasets. Responsibilities include pipeline reliability, migrating legacy batch jobs to modern distributed compute frameworks, and building analytics-ready datasets for downstream stakeholders. Strong SQL skills, experience with Spark or equivalent distributed processing, and a track record of measurable performance improvements are expected.
